text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp has finally come to an end...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It looks like we got through without a hitch.
choice_data_list: We got in a lot of good training.
We got in a lot of good training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. We're ready for the Shuka Sho. Let's keep
up this pace once we're back.

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
Vice President! Some students aren't here for roll
call!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What?! Why must they make things difficult right
until the last minute?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Air Groove seemed busy from start to
finish, it was definitely a productive summer
camp!
